tasks.label: Check USDC vault balances
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && python3 /tmp/check_balances.py

tasks.label: Install deps and check USDC balances
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && pip install python-dotenv web3 -q && python3 /tmp/check_balances.py

tasks.label: Install deps and check USDC balances v2
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && python3 -m pip install python-dotenv web3 -q && python3 /tmp/check_balances.py

tasks.label: Install deps and check USDC balances v3
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && python3 -m pip install python-dotenv web3 -q --break-system-packages && python3 /tmp/check_balances.py

tasks.label: venv check balances
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install python-dotenv web3 -q && python3 /tmp/check_balances.py

tasks.label: Seed TameioVault with USDC
tasks.command: cd backend && npx hardhat run scripts/seed.ts --network monadTestnet

tasks.label: TypeScript check borrow page
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1

tasks.label: Deduplicate borrow page
tasks.command: cd frontend && awk '/^function Row\(\{ label, value \}.*/{found++} found==2{exit} {print}' app/borrow/page.tsx | head -n -1 > /tmp/borrow_fixed.tsx && wc -l /tmp/borrow_fixed.tsx && mv /tmp/borrow_fixed.tsx app/borrow/page.tsx

tasks.label: Find duplicate lines
tasks.command: cd frontend && grep -n 'function Row' app/borrow/page.tsx && grep -n 'function Spinner' app/borrow/page.tsx && wc -l app/borrow/page.tsx

tasks.label: Truncate borrow page at line 375
tasks.command: cd frontend && head -375 app/borrow/page.tsx > /tmp/borrow_clean.tsx && mv /tmp/borrow_clean.tsx app/borrow/page.tsx && wc -l app/borrow/page.tsx

tasks.label: TypeScript check final
tasks.command: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1

tasks.label: Check USDC decimals
tasks.command:
cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import os, json
from pathlib import Path
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from web3 import Web3
load_dotenv(Path('../.env'))
w3 = Web3(Web3.HTTPProvider(os.environ['ENDPOINT_URL']))
USdc = '0xc4fB617E4E4CfbdEb07216dFF62B4E46a2D6FdF6'
abi = [{\"inputs\":[],\"name\":\"decimals\",\"outputs\":[{\"type\":\"uint8\"}],\"stateMutability\":\"view\",\"type\":\"function\"}]
usdc = w3.eth.contract(address=Web3.to_checksum_address(USDC), abi=abi)
print('USDC decimals:', usdc.functions.decimals().call())
"

tasks.label: Seed vault
tasks.command: cd backend && npx hardhat run scripts/seed.ts --network monadTestnet

tasks.label: Seed vault 500
tasks.command: cd backend && npx hardhat run scripts/seed.ts --network monadTestnet

tasks.label: Diagnose reverts
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 /tmp/diag.py

tasks.label: Diag vault usdc
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 /tmp/diag2.py

tasks.label: Test real tx
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 /tmp/test_tx.py

tasks.label: Test transfer types
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 /tmp/test_transfer.py

tasks.label: Retest release
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 /tmp/test_release2.py

tasks.label: Verify main.py
tasks.command: cd backend/rate_engine && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "import main; print('main.py syntax OK')"
